name: High-risk additive CNS depression
actions: Avoid combining high-potency CNS depressants when possible.
If unavoidable, use the lowest effective doses, consider staggered timing, and monitor closely for oversedation and respiratory compromise (educational).
Counsel to avoid alcohol and other sedatives (educational).

rationale: Both drugs are high-potency CNS depressants.
Combined effects can significantly increase oversedation and related harm risk.

explanation_template: {A_name} and {B_name} are both high-potency CNS depressants. Combined use can cause marked sedation and impairment, increasing risk of harm (educational).

references.citation: PD stacking: escalation for high-potency CNS depressant combinations.
